title: carex prolifera
intro: Carex prolifera, also known as the creeping sedge or proliferous sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Carex prolifera include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and tinctures to treat various health conditions.
